action.reasoning: Observation: Fresh start, no code yet. Analysis: Need to explore data, build model, train, and evaluate. Decision: First explore data structure, then build a baseline with pretrained CLIP ViT-B/16 fine-tuned on the training data. Will use class-weighted loss for imbalanced classes and strong augmentation for domain generalization. Start with few epochs to get baseline score and measure iteration time.
